title: RuntimeEventsNats
description: Global runtime event subjects shared by many deployments (idle-reaper, queue-consumer, mdp-optimizer, des-simulator, contracts-service, trading, webrtc-signaling, ai-ml-pipeline). Each publisher emits to dd.remote.events; the websocket bridge re-publishes to dd.remote.websocket.events.

subjects.name: RuntimeEvents
subjects.description: Generic runtime event bus. Every deployment publishes lifecycle, error, telemetry-style events here. The default for NATS_EVENT_SUBJECT across the codebase.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.events

subjects.name: WebsocketEvents
subjects.description: WebSocket event bridge used by gleamlang-server and gleamlang-ws-server. Defaults to NATS_PUBLISH_SUBJECT='dd.remote.websocket.events'.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.websocket.events
